title: The More I Waited, The More I Won
description: Stop overtrading and start winning! These 3 patience tips changed my trading game forever. Master the art of waiting for high-probability setups.
script: The more I waited, the better my results. Wait for clean liquidity sweeps. No messy entries. Only trade during high impact news. Skip low volatility. One perfect setup beats ten mediocre trades. Follow R2F Trading for more tips like this.
